headline: Eaton Recognized for the 15th Time as One of the World’s Most Ethical Companies®
summary: CLEVELAND, March 20, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton (NYSE:ETN) has been celebrated as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies for the 15th time by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices.

headline: Helios Stock: Emerging Growth Catalysts and the Key Risks in 2026
